title: Hallmark Large Gift Bag - Happy Birthday Design
features: GIFT BAG: Our colourful large gift bag is the perfect way to celebrate their birthday. With a vibrant design it can turn any birthday surprise into a thoughtful gesture, the perfect way to make their big day even brighter and as special as they are.

LARGE GIFT BAG: This gift bag from Hallmark is the perfect choice to celebrate a very colourful birthday celebration. This bag features yellow sides with a colourful star pattern, the message 'Happy Birthday' in colourful text and red cord handles.

SMILING GIFT TAG: This gift bag comes complete with a co-ordinating yellow smiley face, circular gift tag. The tag provides enough space for you to write your own personal birthday message, that we can guarantee will make them smile.
HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is made using material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources.

LARGE SIZE: This large gift bag measures 33cm by 26.5cm by 14.6cm and the large size is perfect for adding all their birthday treats to. Deliver a special gin, their favourite bottle of fizz, a photo frame and more to celebrate their big day.
description: From the manufacturer Whatever the occasion and whatever the vibe, with our fantastic collection of wrapping paper, gift bags and accessories, perfect presents are delivered every time! Our promise, to help inspire our customers to live caring, connected lives full of meaningful moments, is something that we take very seriously here at Hallmark. Since 1910, when JC Hall started our company with nothing but two shoeboxes full of picture postcards, we’ve been doing our best to help people celebrate all the special people and special days in their lives. No matter who you’re celebrating or lifting up, Hallmark has the perfect card to help you connect with the ones you love.
